text.title: Quit Day Job Trigger Contract Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from the contract artefact to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for quit-day-job-trigger-contract.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the contract specific enough to fire deterministically AND reviewed on cadence?

conclusion.verdict: skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: Trigger threshold $4k MRR + 3-month window + output stored at .product/decisions/quit-day-job.md + 2 evidence links + owner Ruslan + quarterly review last run 2026-05-23 → APPROVE → contract is live.
